name: @podium/domain
description: Pure Podium domain logic: the issue closed/stage machine, ready/blocked/deferred derivation, the issue authorization policy (roles, scopes, authorize), session/issue snooze predicates, git remote identity, worktree/repo/machine-affinity identity, session dedup + attention-priority math. No IO, no sqlite, no node imports, no @podium/protocol dependency — a zero-dependency leaf package.
